case_title: UM, SUNGWON G. VS PARK, SOON KEUN

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 406446 FILED BY PLAINTIFF UM, SUNGWON G. AS TO DEFENDANT PARK, SOON KEUN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UM, SUNGWON G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, SOON KEUN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,399.66 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,919.66, CREDIT OF $87.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
